stemHtml: Which of the following occurrences is classified as an aircraft accident?

options.a: In flight, an engine turbine destroys the engine and its cowling but no other part of the aircraft suffers serious damage.
options.b: A stowaway is killed by falling from the undercarriage bay on approach to land.
options.c: A cabin crew member is attacked and seriously injured by a passenger during flight.
options.d: An engineer is struck and seriously injured after the crew has boarded the aircraft.
